text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen is here, and an unexpected
visitor shows up in the waiting room while Narita
Taishin is away.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's Narita Taishin's mother who, after telling me
of her complicated relationship with her
daughter, entrusts me with a bouquet of flowers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When Narita Taishin returns, I tell her the flowers
are from a fan, but she immediately sees through
the lie.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She tells me that she doesn't care whether or not
her mother is watching.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She'll simply run, like she always does, and win.
